comment.body:
Alma's primal downside target from weekly and also from today daily was hit. 

Weekly : Reversion probability went up to 93.85% with primal target of 6521.80
If this is true, volatility is underpriced by 25.06% in the puts! And this is a huge edge.

Weekly upside : To the upside, it is 6718.22 - 6743.68, but vol expansion to the upside is pretty much sold for the week.
